rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s, Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Deposition GRANTED. Plaintiff shall appear for deposition on September 16, 2013. Plaintiff shall pay $780.75 to defendant's counsel no later than September 13, 2013. Also, Plaintiff shall present to the court a declaration from a medical doctor, not a party to this action, stating that Plaintiff due to stomach flu was not able to read and respond to e-mail from August 9, 2013 to August 16, 2013. If Plaintiff fails to produce such declaration, Plaintiff shall pay additional $1,632 to Defendant's counsel no later than September 27, 2013.= (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JO ANN FARESE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Bifurcation (Renotice) DENIED without prejudice to renew at trial. Defendant failed to show that bifurcation of trial is for convenience of witnesses, is in the interest of judicial efficiency or the ends of justice at this time. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JO ANN FARESE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Change And Hearing Date And Dept For Defts' Motion For Bifurcation Of Pltf'S Challenge Of Defts' Legal Authority To Foreclosure

DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s, Notice Of Change And Hearing Date And Dept For Defts' Motion For Bifurcation Of PlaintiffS Challenge Of Defendants' Legal Authority To Foreclosure OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD WESTON VS. TOMMY K ABIB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: And Motion To Compel Further Responsesto Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF HOWARD WESTON's Motion To Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories Continued to September 18, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition to department 501 no later than September 11, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer as to each cause of action. Plaintiff and its counsel again failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B. See Minute Order December 12, 2013. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, moot. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER BUTLER VS. LINDA LINGREN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Amendment To Substitute True Name For Doe Deft And
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER BUTLER's Motion For Leave To File Amendment To Substitute True Name For Doe Deft GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY A. NEEDELMAN VS. DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT DEWOLF REALTY CO., INC., M&H L.P.'s AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiffs shall file an amended complaint within 10 days of service of entry of order. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JEROME GOLDSTEIN VS. RICHARD HUBBARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File First Amended Complaint For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF JEROME GOLDSTEIN's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint For Unlawful Detainer GRANTED is part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the addition of causes of action "Expiration of Lease Term" and "Illegal and Unauthorized Use." Motion is DENIED as to cause of action for "Unauthorized Construction of Alterations," facts giving rise to this cause of action have occurred after complaint was filed. Trial date shall not be set until First Amended Complaint is at issue. Plaintiff shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to file his First Amended Complaint. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELO WILSON VS. PHILLIP GARCIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 10, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT PHILLIP GARCIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to loud noise emanating from Defendant's apartment. = (501/HMD)
